features: Two Sets, Eight Clips – This set includes 2 packs of 4, giving you 8 mini butterfly hair clips with playful fruit designs. Perfect small hair clips women use to add colour and charm to everyday styling.

Chic & Versatile Designs – A mix of small hair clips and mini hair clips shaped as butterflies, decorated with fruit-inspired patterns that bring joyful chicness to ponytails, braids, or half-up looks.
Lightweight & Secure Hold – These mini claw clips are crafted for comfort, designed to hold strands neatly in place without tugging, suitable for all-day wear.
Perfect for All Ages – Loved by children, teens, and women, these small hair claw clips offer playful ways to express style, whether for school, holidays, or special occasions.
Confident Everyday Styling – From casual days to parties, these hair claw clips small help create polished, colourful looks that inspire confidence and self-expression.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Love Styling Your Hair? Discover Must-Have Clips, Brushes, Wraps & Care Tools! 8pk Fruit Butterfly Clips Add To Basket 12pk Patterned Bobbles Buying Options 400pk Hold Hair Grips Add To Basket Pink Hair Towel Wrap Add To Basket 5pk Hair Brush Set Buying Options Hair Dye Bowl & Brush Kit Add To Basket 2pk Head Lice Combs Add To Basket Customer Reviews 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 — — 3.8 out of 5 stars 221 4.4 out of 5 stars 373 4.3 out of 5 stars 137 4.0 out of 5 stars 81 Price £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — £5.29 £ 5 . 29 £3.99 £ 3 . 99 — £4.89 £ 4 . 89 £4.29 £ 4 . 29 Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compact & Travel Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Designed for Grooming ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Home Use Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Gentle on Hair ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What’s included in the 8pk fruit butterfly clips set? You’ll receive 2 sets of 4—8 mini hair claw clips with fruit prints. Compact 2 cm pieces with a gentle, non-slip grip for quick styling at home, school, work, parties or holidays. Are they suitable for different hair types and ages? Yes—suited to women, girls and teens. Best for fine to medium hair; for thicker styles, layer two or pair with a band. Great as small claw clips for thin hair, securing fringes and sections without tugging. What size and materials are the clips? Each clip is approx. 2 cm; lightweight at about 4.5 g per pack. Made from PP with smooth edges for comfort. These small hair clips women use daily are easy to place and remove. How do I style with them from day to night? Pin back fringes, accent plaits or create half-up looks. Slide open, position, press to lock; stack two for impact. These hair claw clips small add playful colour to outfits for work, weekends and evenings. How should I care for and store the clips? Wipe with a dry cloth; avoid heat, perfumes and moisture. Store in a pouch to protect finishes and springs. Keep away from small children. With gentle care, your mini butterfly hair clips stay chic.
